description_long: This house features a modern, rectilinear design with a flat, expansive roof that appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material, accented by a central skylight or glass strip. The main structure is composed of white walls with large, grid-like window arrangements, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. There is a prominent, open courtyard or patio area adjacent to the main building, as well as a smaller detached cube structure that could serve as a utility room or storage. The rear of the house opens onto a large, flat terrace or deck, which is visually separated from the main living area. The overall layout is low and horizontal, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor spaces. The architectural style is minimalist and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white walls, large grid windows, and a spacious wooden terrace. The design is minimalist, featuring open outdoor areas and clean geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, white facade, and attached courtyard with a small detached cube structure.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the flat wooden roof separated from the main structure and the depth of the courtyard area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the large terrace or deck, extensive window arrangements, and the open, horizontal layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the separation between the roof and main building, as well as the spatial relationship of the detached structures.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist door integrated into the white facade.
